allow: Bash(for file in "Business Projects Database" "Business Tasks Database" "Skills Projects Database" "Skills Tasks Database" "Skills Tracker Database" "Documentation Hub Database")

Bash(for file in "Business Projects Database - Usage Guidelines.md" "Business Tasks Database - Usage Guidelines.md" "Skills Projects Database - Usage Guidelines.md" "Skills Tasks Database - Usage Guidelines.md" "Skills Tracker Database - Usage Guidelines.md" "Documentation Hub Database - Usage Guidelines.md")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ rm "Business Tasks Database - Usage Guidelines.md")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ rm "Skills Projects Database - Usage Guidelines.md")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ rm "Skills Tasks Database - Usage Guidelines.md")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ rm "Skills Tracker Database - Usage Guidelines.md")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ rm "Documentation Hub Database - Usage Guidelines.md")

Bash(GIT_EDITOR="sed -i" git rebase -i HEAD~9 -m "pick 890714b
pick 9885cb9
pick cdc46f7
squash 0cb0e89
squash ebd3778
pick f76fb61
squash dd51414
squash 42e8a2f
pick 0920da2")
Bash(for component in Navbar Hero Problems Benefits Features HowItWorks Pricing Testimonials FAQ FinalCTA Footer)

hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$f" in */.claude/commands/*.md|*/.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md|*/.claude/agents/*.md) printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"⚠️ Edytujesz plik-definicję artefaktu (command/skill/agent) inline. Jeśli komenda/skill nakazuje tworzenie przez agenta (np. /ai-commands, /ai-skill: MUST use ai-manager-agent), przepuść to przez agenta — nie pisz inline, nawet z pełnym kontekstem."}}' ;; esac; exit 0

statusLine.command: bash -c 'cols=$(stty size </dev/tty 2>/dev/null | awk '"'"'{print $2}'"'"'); export COLUMNS=$(( ${cols:-120} > 4 ? ${cols:-120} - 4 : 1 )); plugin_dir=$(ls -d "${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"/plugins/cache/*/claude-hud/*/ 2>/dev/null | awk -F/ '"'"'{ print $(NF-1) "\t" $(0) }'"'"' | grep -E '"'"'^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\t'"'"' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n -k4,4n | tail -1 | cut -f2-); exec "/opt/homebrew/bin/bun" --env-file /dev/null "${plugin_dir}src/index.ts"'
